title: University of Southampton Delhi Careers and Employer Week
text:
The University of Southampton Delhi is hosting a Careers and Employer Week, offering students advice from employers and the careers team on being career-ready. Sessions will take place on campus from 01-05 September 2025. The week features a diverse schedule of events:

Monday 01 September 2025: Your future starts now: Employability & career readiness. Topics include a welcome & career advancement services keynote, 'Success at Southampton – Why employability starts now', an overview of the 'Careers & employability ecosystem – India & UK support', employer insights from Investec Global Services, and student club elections & campaigns.

Tuesday 02 September 2025: Culture collide: India × UK mashup. This day includes 'Bridging worlds, blending wisdoms', a self-mapping exercise for skills & aspirations, free time, a workshop on emotional intelligence in the world of AI, and an Indian traditional day & tastes of India celebration.

Wednesday 03 September 2025: Strong body, stronger bonds. Focusing on 'Building resilience, community & support systems', with employer insights & live briefs (SIP), 'Stranded! The ultimate survival challenge: teamwork & leadership', and reflection over tea & coffee.

Thursday 04 September 2025: Navigating the digital landscape. Themes include being 'Responsible, innovative, and future-ready', with alumni insights on 'Journeys & lessons from Southampton', and exploring opportunities as a student, followed by a movie evening.

Friday 05 September 2025: IGNITE: First light of the first batch. A celebration titled 'Celebrate your journey, your cohort, your spark', including dress rehearsals & campus setup, 'UoSD’s Got Talent – Shine on!', and free time before the big night.
summary: University of Southampton Delhi hosts a Careers and Employer Week from September 1-5, 2025, offering workshops, employer insights, skill-building, and networking opportunities for student career readiness.

title: Important Tuition Fee Payment Deadline
text: What is your next step? Pay tuition fees. You must pay the next instalment of your tuition fees before Monday 08 September 2025. Make a payment.
summary: Students at University of Southampton Delhi must pay their next tuition fee instalment by Monday, September 8, 2025. Payment options are available online.
